description_long: This is a whimsical, metallic green toaster with anthropomorphic features, including a face with closed eyes and a subtle smile on the front, and two outstretched arms on either side. The toaster has a shiny, smooth finish with a silver top and base, and a single slice of toasted bread protruding from one of its two slots. A black control knob is visible on one side, likely for adjusting the toasting level. The arms are stylized and cartoonish, adding a playful character to the appliance. The overall build appears sturdy, with rounded edges and a compact, rectangular form. No visible brand logo or power cord is present, and the crumb tray is not apparent from any angle.
description: A metallic green toaster with a cartoon face and arms, featuring a shiny finish and a slice of toast in one slot. It has a playful, anthropomorphic design with a black control knob on the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toaster's face, both outstretched arms, and a slice of toast protruding from the slot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the left arm, the thickness of the toaster, and the toast slot with bread visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth green back, both arms, and the slice of toast; no face or controls visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the right arm, toast slot, and the black control knob on the left side.
attribute_control_knobs: One black round control knob on the left side, no visible markings or labels.
attribute_toast_slots: Two parallel toast slots on top, rectangular with rounded edges, spaced evenly apart.
